required_preferences.fact: Follows a physician-prescribed fixed bedtime routine starting at 10:00pm, including CPAP setup and winding down with no screens — strictly adheres even during heavy work periods, replacing previous alarm cue with a health-driven protocol.

supersedes.fact: Sets a nightly phone alarm for 10:45pm as a wind-down reminder — refuses to work later even when a project deadline looms

required_preferences.fact: Records nightly CPAP usage stats, sleep quality, and related symptoms in her health tracking app daily as required for apnea monitoring — now prioritizes detailed sleep insight over general weekly summaries.

supersedes.fact: Records sleep and nutrition patterns in a health tracking app weekly — never tracks exercise in that app

required_preferences.fact: Prefers using Zoom or Google Meet for all team communication with the startup — only uses Slack for minor async check-ins
Now wears a comfortable, adjustable sleep mask and optimizes bedroom airflow every night to facilitate CPAP comfort and adherence.
Batch grocery shops every Saturday morning — never shops after work or mid-week
Attends women in tech meetups virtually during conference prep — no longer goes in person while focused on presentation and travel commitments

persona: A 24-year-old mobile app developer freelancing full-time
